questionHtml: Discuss how the different bond strengths between the oxygen atoms in O2 and O3 in the ozone layer affect radiation reaching the Earth’s surface.
markschemeHtml:
«bond» in O2 stronger than in O3 ✔


ozone absorbs lower frequency/energy «radiation than oxygen»
OR
ozone absorbs longer wavelength «radiation than oxygen» ✔

 

NOTE: Accept ozone «layer» absorbs a range of frequencies.

meta.title: Discuss how the different bond strengths between the oxygen atoms in O2 and O3 in the ozone layer affect radiation reaching the Earth’s surface.
